battleTraits.name: Always Three Clawsteps Ahead
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Phase, Enemy Movement Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit that is not in combat.
battleTraits.effect: That unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.

enhancements.name: Skilled Manipulator
enhancements.effect: Your general has Ward (4+) while they are within 1" of any friendly Clanrats units.

enhancements.name: Skitterleap
enhancements.effect: On a 6+, remove your general from the battlefield and set them up again on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units. They cannot use MOVE abilities in the following movement phase.

enhancements.name: Cage of Warp Lightning
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of your general and roll a dice.
enhancements.effect: On a 2+, the enemy unit has Strike-last this phase. On a 1, inflict 1 mortal damage on your general.

enhancements.name: Scurry Away
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase. If it does so, no mortal damage is inflicted on it.

regimentAbilities.name: Warpstone-Laced Armour
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Reaction: Opponent declared an Attack ability and targeted your Stormfiends unit
regimentAbilities.effect: Your Stormfiends unit has Ward (5+) for the rest of the turn.

regimentAbilities.name: Endless Swarm of Rats
regimentAbilities.effect: When a friendly Clanrats unit uses its ‘Seething Swarm’ ability, you can return D6 slain models to that unit instead of D3.

abilities.name: Will of the Horned Rat
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 13" of this unit to be the target, then roll a dice.
abilities.effect: On a 3+, add the roll to the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Wither
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 13" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: Shock Gauntlets
abilities.effect: Each time an attack made with this unit’s Shock Gauntlets scores a critical hit, that attack scores D6 hits instead of 1 (make a wound roll for each hit).

abilities.name: Warp Lightning Blast
abilities.effect: Each attack made with this weapon in a single phase must target the same enemy unit. Each hit inflicts 1 mortal damage on the target and the attack sequence ends.

abilities.name: Seething Swarm
abilities.effect: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.
